title: Movementum - Better Movement
description: A mod that adds sliding, dashing, and movement based enchantments based enchantments into Minecraft for a better experience!
body:
Welcome to movementum! movementum is a mod that adds better movement into minecraft with sliding, double jumps, dashes, and more to come soon!
\
\
*the mod may be confusing so go check out our [wiki](https://github.com/File-Modder/Movementum/wiki)*
\
\
**this mod is a heavy work in progress so there may be bugs and debug features enabled as placeholders! please report any bugs [Here](https://github.com/File-Modder/Movementum/issues)!**
\
\
**_dependencies:_**\
fabric API,\
player animation library
